question: Implement a `MyString` class that mimics `std::string` by managing a dynamically allocated C-style character array. Provide a deep copy constructor for `MyString`.

test_cases.expected:
s0: '' (length: 0)
s1: 'Hello, World!' (length: 13)
s2: '' (length: 0)
s_null: '' (length: 0)
s3 (copy of s1): 'Hello, World!' (length: 13)
s4 (initial): 'Initial string' (length: 14)
s4 (assigned s1): 'Hello, World!' (length: 13)
s5 (self-assigned): 'Another string' (length: 14)
s6 (assigned s7): 'Very Long String That Will Be Assigned' (length: 38)
--- End of tests ---
